mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_import_jobs (customer_id, user_id, import_type, file_name, file_size, status, import_options, created_at) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{userId}, #{importType}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'PENDING'), #{importOptions}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT j.*, u.name AS user_name FROM device_import_jobs j LEFT JOIN users u ON j.user_id = u.id WHERE j.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY j.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE device_import_jobs SET status = #{status}, total_records = #{totalRecords}, processed_records = #{processedRecords}, success_count = #{successCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, skipped_count = #{skippedCount}, error_log = #{errorLog}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
UPDATE device_import_jobs SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM device_import_jobs WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_export_jobs (customer_id, user_id, export_type, status, filter_criteria, export_options, created_at) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{userId}, #{exportType}, 'PENDING', #{filterCriteria}, #{exportOptions}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT j.*, u.name AS user_name FROM device_export_jobs j LEFT JOIN users u ON j.user_id = u.id WHERE j.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY j.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE device_export_jobs SET status = #{status}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_size = #{fileSize}, total_records = #{totalRecords}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
UPDATE device_export_jobs SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM device_export_jobs WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
